expectations.evidence: Transcript describes a manual plan plus manual rename/update work in a disposable workspace; it never mentions `kast_rename`.

expectations.text: Shows an edit plan listing all affected files before applying
expectations.evidence: Final answer begins with an `Edit plan:` and lists the renamed file plus the affected Kotlin files before the “Applied in disposable workspace” section.

expectations.text: Updates import statements, not just the declaration
expectations.evidence: Workspace verification finds `import io.amichne.konditional.core.registry.FeatureRegistry` in six updated files, so the rename changed imports as well as the declaration.

expectations.text: Runs diagnostics or reports compile status after the rename
expectations.evidence: Final answer includes `./gradlew --offline compileKotlin` with `Result: **BUILD SUCCESSFUL**`.

expectations.text: Does not leave broken references in any module
expectations.evidence: Exact-symbol verification finds no `\bNamespaceRegistry\b` matches left in the disposable workspace, and rerunning `./gradlew --offline compileKotlin --quiet` exited 0.

claims.claim: `FeatureRegistry.kt` exists in the disposable workspace and declares `interface FeatureRegistry`.
claims.evidence: Workspace file inspection shows `interface FeatureRegistry` at `FeatureRegistry.kt:16`.

claims.claim: Import statements were updated to the renamed symbol.
The renamed disposable workspace still compiles.
claims.evidence: I reran `JAVA_HOME=/Users/amichne/.sdkman/candidates/java/21.0.8-graal ./gradlew --offline compileKotlin --quiet` in the disposable workspace and it exited 0.
